summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ORÍGENES agricultural consulting landing page. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but critical frontend form integration issue prevents contact form submission.

ui_bugs.issue: Department and Culture dropdown selections not updating React state
ui_bugs.details: Select components display options correctly but onValueChange callback not triggered. Button text remains 'Seleccionar' after option selection.

integration_issues.issue: Form submission fails with 422 validation error due to missing required fields (department, culture)
integration_issues.root_cause: React state not updated by Select components, causing empty values to be sent to backend

passed_tests: Backend API POST /api/contact/ - creates contact successfully
Backend API GET /api/contact/ - lists contacts with pagination
Backend API GET /api/contact/{id} - retrieves specific contact
Backend API PATCH /api/contact/{id}/status - updates contact status
Backend validation - properly rejects invalid data with 422
All main sections present (Hero, Services, Technologies, Experience, Cultures, Contact)
Responsive design - form accessible on mobile
Basic form fields (name, email, phone, message) working correctly
Google Analytics integration (graceful handling of missing credentials)
Email service integration (graceful handling of missing credentials)

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Page loads and displays correctly, but form submission broken

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component integration in Contact.jsx. The onValueChange callbacks for department and culture dropdowns are not updating React state. This prevents form submission as required fields remain empty. Verify Select component props and handleChange function integration.
